chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr.B.A.No. 1240 of 2023 [Syed Zafar Ahmed Versus The State] Date Order with signature of Judges For hearing of bail application 26.06.2023 Mr. Shamshad Ali Qureshi, Advocate for the Applicant. Ms. Rubina Qadir, Deputy Prosecutor General, Sindh. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. The applicant is alleged to be impersonating him to be an advocate, for that he was booked and reported upon. On refusal of bail by learned XVth Judicial Magistrate Karachi South and learned Vth Addl. Sessions Judge, Karachi South, the applicant has sought for the same from this Court by way of this application u/s 497 Cr.P.C. Heard arguments and perused the record. The offence alleged against the applicant is not falling within prohibitory clause; the case has finally been challaned and there is no apprehension of absconsion or tempering with the evidence on his part. In these circumstance; a case for release of the applicant on bail on point of further inquiry is made out. In view of above, the applicant is admitted to bail, subject to his furnishing surety in sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees Fifty Thousand Only) and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of learned trial Court. Instant bail application is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE
